# figures/

Paper figures go here.

**Figure 2** — CNN normalized mean activation profiles. Generated by `src/figure2_generation.py` or by the Figure 2 section in the notebook. Shows how the first Conv1D layer responds differently to stateless vs stateful features for benign and attack traffic.

Run `src/figure2_generation.py` after training the baseline models (Experiment 1) to regenerate this figure.
